# ✨ Feature Request — Real-Time MIDI Notation

Thank you for helping improve this world‑first real‑time MIDI notation prototype!  
Please fill out the details below so we can properly evaluate your idea.

---

## 🌟 What feature would you like to see?
A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

---

## 🎯 Why is this feature useful?
Explain the benefit:

- What problem does it solve?
- Who would use it?
- How does it improve the project?

---

## 🧩 How should it work?
Describe how the feature should behave.

Examples:

- UI behavior  
- MIDI interaction  
- Rendering logic  
- Expected workflow  

---

## 🔄 Alternatives considered
Are there other ways this could be implemented?  
List any alternative ideas or approaches.

---

## 📸 Examples or references (optional)
If you have screenshots, videos, or links that illustrate the idea, include them here.

---

## 📊 Additional notes
Anything else we should know?

---

Thank you for contributing to the evolution of Real‑Time MIDI Notation!  
Your ideas help shape the future of this project.
